articles.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
articles.summary: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

articles.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
articles.summary: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

articles.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
articles.summary: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.

articles.title: Art schools are being torn apart by AI
articles.summary: When my baby brother, a 3D modelling and animation student, talks to me about his projects and studies, the pride I usually feel is becoming increasingly tainted by a growing sense of dread. As a creative professional and former design student myself, I understand all too well how fierce the competition for postgraduate jobs will […]

articles.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
articles.summary: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

articles.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
articles.summary: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

articles.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
articles.summary: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

articles.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
articles.summary: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.
